name: Ryosan Company, Limited
summary: Ryosan Company, Limited, an electronics trading company, engages in the sale of semiconductors, and electronic components and equipment in Japan and internationally. It sells semiconductor products, including microcontrollers, analog and power devices, compound devices, system LSIs, DRAM, and other products; and electronic components, such as display devices, power supplies, and electromechanical components comprising LCDs, power supplies/batteries, passive components, sensors, electronic circuit boards, and others. The company also offers electronic equipment products comprising servers, industrial computers, and PCs; embedded systems; and sputtering devices, as well as laser machining, etching, CVD, deposition, vacuum drying, and various second-hand equipment to customers manufacturing semiconductors, electronic components, and lithium-ion batteries. In addition, it provides consigned processing services to customers in selling various target materials, EMIs for smartphone and tablet devices, thermal solutions, and water-resistant products; and various solutions. Ryosan Company, Limited was incorporated in 1949 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
